CHAR 1 Medications: injections (number days). This field indicates the number of days the resident received injections during the last 7 days.
467 O4A O4A_ANTIPSYCHOTIC (O4A) Antipsychotic CHAR 1 Medications: days received the following medication during the last 7 days - antipsychotic.
468 O4B O4B_ANTIANXIETY (O4B) Antianxiety CHAR 1 Medications: days received the following medication during the last 7 days - antianxiety.
469 O4C O4C_ANTIDEPRESS (O4C) Antidepressant CHAR 1 Medications: days
